description: User pauses on the screen, likely reading the error message 'Please provide an Australian mobile phone number'.
frame_description: The screen shows a mobile number input field with an error message and a disabled 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button.

description: User clicks on the mobile number input field to begin entry.
frame_description: The input field gains a blue focus border and the numeric keypad appears at the bottom of the screen.

description: The numeric keypad and a suggested phone number appear after the input field is focused.
frame_description: A numeric keyboard and a suggested phone number '0490 024 490' are now visible.

description: User moves the cursor over the suggested phone number '0490 024 490' above the keypad.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned directly over the auto-fill suggestion for the phone number.
